name: mcp-color-picker
description: MCP App that displays a color picker

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --packages=external && esbuild main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --packages=external --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.start: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
scripts.start:stdio: NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
